steps.title: Identify the critical contrast needed
steps.content: The conclusion states that paywalls benefit larger newspapers more than smaller ones. The evidence must show a large newspaper achieving substantially better results than a small newspaper.

steps.title: Confirm Choice C — The New York Times had a 20% revenue change, while the Denver Post had a −1% revenue change. provides this contrast
steps.content:
Choice C — The New York Times had a 20% revenue change, while the Denver Post had a −1% revenue change. shows the New York Times (large, 20% revenue gain) versus the Denver Post (small, −1% change), illustrating the dramatic advantage paywalls delivered to larger papers.

The others either compare two large papers, omit the size comparison, or contain factual errors.

That matches Choice C — The New York Times had a 20% revenue change, while the Denver Post had a −1% revenue change..
